catalyst.name: Q2 2026 earnings + first staggered IPO lockup unlock (20% base tranche, +10% bonus tranche if SPCX closes >=$175.50 on 5 of the 10 sessions into the earnings date) + $25B investment-grade bond deal already priced/oversubscribed

flags: SLS concentration WORSENED since last run: now 73.8% of NAV (was 69.8%), more than double the 35% single-name trim threshold, on price strength ahead of an unconfirmed catalyst. Deterministic sizing calc: trimming ~36.3 of 69 shares would bring it back to the 35% cap.
Zero USD cash buffer persists - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX down -14.9% since 2026-07-11 with no negative credit/company news found; move looks like general de-risking into the approaching lockup unlock rather than a specific negative catalyst.

DATA QUALITY: this run happened on a Sunday with markets closed; all 'current' prices are Friday 2026-07-17's close, not a live premarket quote. Re-run once premarket data is live before acting on these numbers.
READ-ONLY: no orders were placed, modified, or queued during this run.
